'''javupu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cabalzarite|cabalzarite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-v-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cabalzarite|cabalzarite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| javupu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:jævipith|jævipith]] || [[word:jævipij|jævipij]] || [[word:jævipish|jævipish]] || [[word:jævipi|jævipi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:javuvuputh|javuvuputh]] || [[word:javuvupuj|javuvupuj]] || [[word:javuvupush|javuvupush]] || [[word:javuvupu|javuvupu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:javuputh|javuputh]] || [[word:javupuj|javupuj]] || [[word:javupush|javupush]] || [[word:javupu|javupu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:javufputh|javufputh]] || [[word:javufpuj|javufpuj]] || [[word:javufpush|javufpush]] || [[word:javufpuf|javufpuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:javuputhu|javuputhu]] || [[word:javupuju|javupuju]] || [[word:javupushu|javupushu]] || [[word:javupuku|javupuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:javuputh|javuputh]] || [[word:javupuj|javupuj]] || [[word:javupush|javupush]] || [[word:javupu|javupu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:javuputhul|javuputhul]] || [[word:javupujul|javupujul]] || [[word:javupushul|javupushul]] || [[word:javupukul|javupukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:javuputhuthu|javuputhuthu]] || [[word:javupujuju|javupujuju]] || [[word:javupushushu|javupushushu]] || [[word:javupuku|javupuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:javuputhun|javuputhun]] || [[word:javupujun|javupujun]] || [[word:javupushun|javupushun]] || [[word:javupukun|javupukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:javuputhuoro|javuputhuoro]] || [[word:javupujuoro|javupujuoro]] || [[word:javupushuoro|javupushuoro]] || [[word:javupukuoro|javupukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c91cec}}
